title: Lead SEO Specialist at Droom Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Droom Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Droom Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Droom Ventures Solutions:
Droom Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Droom Ventures Solutions!
